name: OmopPatientPerson
title: OMOP-Convertible Patient → person
description: FHIR Patient that can be converted to OMOP `person`. Requires birthDate (used for year/month/day_of_birth), gender (mapped to gender_concept_id), and at least one identifier (used as person_source_value). The discriminator is birthDate presence — Patient has no `code` element, so no domain ValueSet binding applies.

element.comment: At least one identifier is required; used as person.person_source_value (best of SSN > MR > first).

binding.description: male | female | other | unknown. Mapped to gender_concept_id (8507/8532/8521/8551).

element.comment: Required — drives person.year_of_birth (and month/day/birth_datetime when components are present). This is the routing discriminator for Patient → person.
Optional. When present, drives the Patient → location edge and person.location_id.
Optional. First Practitioner reference becomes person.provider_id.
